relatedFeatures.reason: Pair records with init-only setters when you want immutable models that still work well with object initializers.
Required members build on record-style modeling by enforcing complete initialization at compile time.
Primary constructors continue the move toward concise data-focused type declarations in newer C# versions.

examples.title: Modeling immutable data with a record
examples.description: Records are concise reference types with value-based equality and built-in support for non-destructive updates.
